title: Executive right a mineral right
doc_html:
§106.  Executive right a mineral right

The executive right is a mineral right.  It may exist independently or as a part of another form of mineral right, such as a mineral servitude.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §106, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
